Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FormulaVariable

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FormulaVariable
public class FormulaVariable extends SObject

Java class for FormulaVariable complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FormulaVariable">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Children" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataTypeLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Entity" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}EntityDefinition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntityId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FormulaType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasChildren" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Parent" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FormulaVariable" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Value" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
